title: schoberia vera
intro: Schoberia vera, also known as the Indian walnut, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia. It is a deciduous tree with medicinal properties, particularly in its bark and leaves, which contain alkaloids and terpenoids that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Schoberia vera include reducing fever, treating gastrointestinal disorders, and managing respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Schoberia vera is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations such as capsules, tablets, and tinctures.
